headline: Transcript: How Stephen Miller is defining Trump’s second term
summary: Marc Filippino talks to Guy Chazan and Edward Luce
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Swamp Notes podcast episode: ‘How Stephen Miller is defining Trump’s second term’

Marc FilippinoThere are a lot of public figures in the Trump administration, but among the former Fox News hosts and personal attorneys of Washington, Stephen Miller stands apart.

Stephen Miller voice clipWe will achieve victory for our children, for our families, for our civilisation, and for every patriot who stands with us.

Marc FilippinoMiller is arguably among the most powerful people in the White House, and he’s waged a campaign of retribution against the president’s perceived enemies while pushing for a hardline policy agenda. Stephen Miller is now more powerful than ever, and we wanna know how that happened.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

This is Swamp Notes, the weekly podcast from the Financial Times, where we talk about all the things happening in US politics, finance and the economy. I’m Marc Filippino, and this week we’re asking: does Stephen Miller define the second
